creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon Apr  7 10:12:58 2014
New Revision: 350450
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350450
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350450/

Log:
  - Update to 3.2.7
  
  Changes:	http://www.egenix.com/products/python/mxBase/changelog.html
  PR:		188310
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/lang/py-mx-base/Makefile
  head/lang/py-mx-base/distinfo
  head/lang/py-mx-base/pkg-plist

Modified: head/lang/py-mx-base/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/py-mx-base/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 10:12:53 2014	(r350449)
+++ head/lang/py-mx-base/Makefile	Mon Apr  7 10:12:58 2014	(r350450)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mx-base
-PORTVERSION=	3.2.6
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.7
 CATEGORIES=	lang python
 MASTER_SITES=	https://downloads.egenix.com/python/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -14,7 +13,6 @@ COMMENT=	eGenix mx-Extension Series for 
 
 USE_PYTHON=		2
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
-# PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=yes misses .py[oc] files
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	egenix-mx-base
 PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/${PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME:C/[^A-Za-z0-9.]+/_/g}-${PYDISTUTILS_PKGVERSION:C/[^A-Za-z0-9.]+/_/g}-py${PYTHON_VER}-nspkg.pth

==============================================================================
--- head/lang/py-mx-base/distinfo	Mon Apr  7 10:12:53 2014	(r350449)
+++ head/lang/py-mx-base/distinfo	Mon Apr  7 10:12:58 2014	(r350450)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (egenix-mx-base-3.2.6.tar.gz) = c8bc38421e0c6827dc8050f9423f941e5f9f3a7167d60f83b5f22da8165050d7
-SIZE (egenix-mx-base-3.2.6.tar.gz) = 4584879
+SHA256 (egenix-mx-base-3.2.7.tar.gz) = db9f283bdc8a9a5b76260fdf33c7998b95628d7752c8bb6811a66b8924883d9c
+SIZE (egenix-mx-base-3.2.7.tar.gz) = 4585906

==============================================================================
--- head/lang/py-mx-base/pkg-plist	Mon Apr  7 10:12:53 2014	(r350449)
+++ head/lang/py-mx-base/pkg-plist	Mon Apr  7 10:12:58 2014	(r350450)
@@ -29,6 +29,9 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/__init__.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/__init__.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/btr.h
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/calc-sectorsize.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/calc-sectorsize.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/calc-sectorsize.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/mxBeeBase.h
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/mxBeeBase.so
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/mx/BeeBase/mxBeeBase/mxh.h
